# dependencytrack_project_findings (Data Source)

Retrieves the vulnerability findings of a project from Dependency-Track.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dependencytrack_project" "web_app" {
  name    = "Web Application"
  version = "1.0.0"
}

# Fetch the unsuppressed vulnerability findings of the project
data "dependencytrack_project_findings" "web_app" {
  project = data.dependencytrack_project.web_app.id
}

# Include suppressed findings as well
data "dependencytrack_project_findings" "web_app_all" {
  project    = data.dependencytrack_project.web_app.id
  suppressed = true
}

output "web_app_vulnerability_ids" {
  value = toset(data.dependencytrack_project_findings.web_app.findings[*].vuln_id)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project` (String) The UUID of the project

### Optional

- `suppressed` (Boolean) Whether to include suppressed findings in the result. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `findings` (Attributes List) List of findings (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--findings))
- `id` (String) Identifier of this data source result (the project UUID)

<a id="nestedatt--findings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `findings`

Read-Only:

- `analysis_state` (String) The audit analysis state of the finding, if analyzed
- `analyzer_identity` (String) The analyzer that attributed the finding
- `attributed_on` (Number) Timestamp (epoch milliseconds) when the finding was attributed
- `component_name` (String) The name of the affected component
- `component_uuid` (String) The UUID of the affected component
- `component_version` (String) The version of the affected component
- `cwes` (List of Number) The CWE IDs associated with the vulnerability
- `is_suppressed` (Boolean) Whether the finding is suppressed
- `severity` (String) The severity of the vulnerability
- `source` (String) The source of the vulnerability (e.g. `NVD`, `GITHUB`, `INTERNAL`)
- `vuln_id` (String) The identifier of the vulnerability (e.g. a CVE ID)
- `vulnerability_uuid` (String) The UUID of the vulnerability
